name: New York City — Summer 1884
description: Lower Manhattan, Gilded Age. Horse-drawn traffic on granite setts, elevated railway overhead, street vendor cries, church bells, harbor foghorns and ferry whistles. No automobiles, no subway, no electric street lighting. Listener at 2nd-floor brownstone window facing east toward a commercial avenue.

assetGeneration.promptContext: Immersive soundscape of Lower Manhattan in summer 1884. Belgian block granite sett streets, horse-drawn vehicles (carts, hansom cabs, omnibuses), elevated steam railway on nearby avenue, street vendor cries (oysters, ice, hot corn), church bells, East River ferry whistles and harbor foghorns, blacksmith shops, children playing, pigeons. No motorized vehicles, no electric sounds, no subway. Gas-lit at night.
